arts.ttl: Real Madrid star Jude Bellingham lifts lid on alleged Antonio Rudiger training ground bust-up
arts.sum: Real Madrid midfielder Jude Bellingham responds to his alleged training ground altercation with teammate Antonio Rudiger earlier this week.

arts.sum: The future of Carlo Ancelotti will be on the line in the return leg of the Champions League’s quarter-finals, as Real Madrid will attempt to mount an improbable three-goal comeback over Arsenal, and in the final La Liga rounds. arts.ttl: Real Madrid vs Arsenal – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Real Madrid welcome Arsenal to the Bernabeu tonight seeking to complete La Remontada. The European champions trail 3-0 on aggregate following an emphatic first-leg defeat in North London and must produce one of the Champions League’s great comebacks to reach the semi-finals. arts.ttl: Arsenal: William Saliba given Real Madrid transfer warning ahead of Bernabeu showdown
arts.sum: Arsenal centre-back told ‘grass is not greener’ amid Real Madrid interest

arts.ttl: Real Madrid squad for Arsenal Champions League tie confirmed as two return and seven miss out
arts.sum: Real Madrid will be hoping to produce yet another Champions League comeback when they take on Arsenal in the second leg of their quarter-final tie. Following their drubbing in London last week, Carlo Ancelotti has made changes to his Real Madrid squad for the quarter-final tie.

arts.ttl: Arsenal land another blow to Real Madrid: €60m star makes transfer decision
arts.sum: Real Madrid have received a summer transfer setback with the news that one of their major summer targets would prefer a Premier League move, with Champions League opponents Arsenal one of the clubs aiming for a big-money move. Bournemouth centre-back Dean Huijsen has become a transfer priority for many leading clubs ahead of the summer, and the Spain international centre-back has made the bold decision that he wishes to remain in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid announce squad for Champions League match against Arsenal
arts.sum: Real Madrid have published their squad list for Wednesday’s match against Arsenal in the return leg of the Champions League Quarterfinals. REAL MADRID’S SQUAD LIST:

arts.ttl: Arsenal already have wonderkid in their ranks who is tipped to ‘be better than Lamine Yamal’
arts.sum: Ethan Nwaneri has been a breakout star for Arsenal this season, and ex-Gunners defender Emmanuel Eboue has high hopes for the teenager

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham's England issue, why dressing room were glad he left, Real Madrid bust-up
arts.sum: Jude Bellingham will look to play a starring role for Real Madrid as they try to overturn a 3-0 deficit against Arsenal on Wednesday night, having reportedly clashed with a team-mate in the build-up

arts.ttl: Real Madrid fans to display bizarre chess tifo against Arsenal - with seven-word message to inspire a comeback at the Bernabeu
arts.sum: Real head into the second leg at the Bernabeu with a three-goal deficit to overturn after Declan Rice led Arsenal to an emphatic victory at the Emirates last week.
